title: Soup Spoons 4 Pieces Set, Stainless Steel Round Stainless Steel Bouillon, 4 High-Grade Spoons for Soup Spoon for Kitchen, Dining Table, Sleek Design, Durable Construction
features: 【Durable Stainless Steel】Our soup spoons are crafted from premium stainless steel, ensuring strength, durability, and resistance to rust. These sturdy table spoons maintain their shine and quality over time
【Comfortable & Ergonomic】Designed with a smooth, rounded handle, each soup spoon offers a comfortable grip, making them ideal for everyday meals and special occasions

【Versatile Usage】This spoon set is perfect for enjoying soups, stews, cereals, desserts, and more. Whether at home, in a restaurant, or at a gathering, these spoons cutlery provide excellent functionality
【Easy to Clean】Our tablespoons are dishwasher safe, allowing for effortless cleaning and maintenance, saving you time in the kitchen
【Set of 4】You will receive a set of four soup spoons, each measuring 17cm x 4.5cm. The ideal quantity for a small family or for sharing with guests, making it a practical addition to any dining setup
